name: codeguard-ai
description: The most complete AI-era security platform: hallucination detection, MCP CVE scanner, LLM jailbreak detection, ML model (pickle) exploit scanner, IaC/SAST, 60+ secret patterns, typosquat + cryptojacking + license compliance. Real-time, offline-capable, VS Code + CLI + GitHub Action.

commands.title: CodeGuard: Ask AI to Fix Security Issue
CodeGuard: Scan AI Config Files for Attacks
CodeGuard: Sanitize Rules File (Remove Hidden Unicode)
CodeGuard: Get Patch Report for Package
CodeGuard: Explain Security Issue with AI
CodeGuard: Deep SAST Scan (LLM + Adversarial Verify)
CodeGuard: Scan Git Changes for Security Regressions
CodeGuard v8: Scan MCP Servers Against CVE Database
CodeGuard v8: Scan for LLM Jailbreak Patterns
CodeGuard v8: Scan ML Model Files (Pickle/ONNX/Keras)
CodeGuard v8: Check Package for Typosquat Risk
CodeGuard v8: Run All New Detection Engines

chatParticipants.name: codeguard
chatParticipants.description: Real-time security analysis for AI-generated code. Ask about vulnerabilities, hallucinated packages, and fixes.

codeguard.severityThreshold.description: Minimum severity level to show warnings. Vulns below this level are ignored.

codeguard.enableHallucinationDetection.description: Check if imported packages actually exist on their registry (slopsquatting detection).

codeguard.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after typing stops before scanning (reduces API calls).

codeguard.cacheTtlMinutes.description: How long to cache vulnerability results (in minutes).

codeguard.ignoredPackages.description: List of package names to skip scanning (allowlist).

codeguard.enableAiFeedback.description: Enable AI-to-AI feedback (communicate security issues back to AI assistants).

codeguard.enableCommentInjection.description: Inject temporary security warning comments for AI assistants to read. Only triggers for AI-generated code.

codeguard.enableCodeLens.description: Show CodeLens buttons (Ask AI to Fix, View Details) above vulnerable imports.

codeguard.enableDecorations.description: Show inline editor decorations with security warnings (visual-only, doesn't modify source).

codeguard.enableChatParticipant.description: Register @codeguard chat participant in Copilot Chat.

codeguard.enableLanguageModelApi.description: Use VS Code Language Model API to communicate with AI models directly.

codeguard.privateRegistries.description: Private scoped package prefixes to skip (e.g., '@mycompany/'). These won't be checked against public registries.

codeguard.enableTyposquatDetection.description: Detect packages with names suspiciously similar to popular packages (typosquatting).

codeguard.enablePopularityCheck.description: Flag packages with very low download counts as potentially suspicious.

codeguard.aiDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay for AI-generated code (shorter = faster detection). Human typing uses the normal debounceMs.

codeguard.enableInstallGate.description: Intercept npm/pip/cargo install commands in the terminal and analyze packages before execution.

codeguard.enableRulesScanner.description: Scan .cursorrules, copilot-instructions.md, .windsurfrules and other AI config files for hidden attacks.

codeguard.enableGhin.description: Enable the Global Hallucination Intelligence Network (GHIN) local database.

codeguard.enableGhinCloudSync.description: Opt-in: anonymously contribute and receive hallucination data from the GHIN cloud network. Only package names are shared.

codeguard.enableProvenanceCheck.description: Check npm Sigstore provenance and PyPI PEP 740 attestations for package supply chain verification.

codeguard.enableAutoPatch.description: Automatically suggest patches and safe versions using OSV.dev, GitHub Advisory, and registry data.

codeguard.enableScriptAnalysis.description: Analyze package install scripts (preinstall/postinstall) for suspicious behavior before execution.

codeguard.enableSecretsScanner.description: Scan source files for hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, and credentials.

codeguard.enableCodeVulnScanner.description: Scan source files for code vulnerability patterns (SQL injection, XSS, eval, etc.).

codeguard.enableSecurityScore.description: Compute and display a project security posture score (0-100) in the status bar.

enumDescriptions: Audit: log findings but don't block anything
Enforce: block installs and fail on critical findings
codeguard.strictnessLevel.description: How strictly CodeGuard enforces security policies.

codeguard.ghinApiUrl.description: URL of the GHIN Intelligence API. Change for self-hosted enterprise deployments.
